ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track or program the course belongs to */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor assigned to the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours the course is worth */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "is_elective" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the course is elective */,
  "prerequisite_text" TEXT /* A text field to describe the prerequisites in more detail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track or program */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the track */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the track in semesters or years */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree associated with the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the session belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  "day_or_eve" TEXT /* Daytime or evening session */,
  "break_weeks" TEXT /* Weeks with no classes (e.g., spring break) */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number where the session is held */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the session is held */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_sessions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student in the course */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date the student withdrew from the course, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major or field of study of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year the student is in (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's academic adviser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_adviser_id FOREIGN KEY ("adviser_id") REFERENCES academic_advisers ("adviser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course requiring the resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource needed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., available, unavailable) */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the resource */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_resources_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course with the prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "prerequisite_description" TEXT /* A description of the prerequisite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corequisites" (
  "corequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course with the corequisite */,
  "corequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corequisite course */,
  "corequisite_description" TEXT /* A description of the corequisite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corequisites_corequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("corequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheduling_conflicts" (
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduling conflict */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course with the scheduling conflict */,
  "conflicting_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conflicting course */,
  "conflict_type" TEXT /* Type of conflict (e.g., time overlap, resource shortage) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the conflict resolution (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conflict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduling_conflicts_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduling_conflicts_conflicting_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("conflicting_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course receiving feedback */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the course */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the student */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_announcements" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the announcement is related to */,
  "announcement_title" TEXT /* Title of the announcement */,
  "announcement_content" TEXT /* Content of the announcement */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date the announcement was made */,
  "important" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the announcement is important */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_announcements_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Instructor, Student) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., Manage Courses, View Schedules) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_permissions" (
  "user_role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES user_permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_advisers" (
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adviser */,
  "adviser_name" TEXT /* Name of the adviser */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the adviser */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the adviser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adviser_id")
)
